description: Project idea pipeline — all ideas, bugs, and improvement requests before WP entry

status_legend.open: No fate decision yet — requires Team 00 + Nimrod review
status_legend.closed: Fate decided and actioned. From pipeline perspective: done. Delivery_ref = canonical WP ID or artifact.

closed_result_legend.fulfilled: closed-green — idea was executed: merged into WP, became WP, or done directly (fate: merged | new_wp | done)
closed_result_legend.cancelled: closed-red — idea was not pursued (fate: cancelled)

fate_legend.merged: Absorbed into an existing WP — delivery_ref = WP ID from roadmap.yaml
fate_legend.new_wp: Became its own WP — delivery_ref = WP ID (or 'backlog' if not yet assigned to a WP)
fate_legend.done: Executed directly in ≤1 session, no WP — delivery_ref = commit hash or file path
fate_legend.cancelled: Not pursuing — delivery_ref = N/A_CANCEL, reason in fate_rationale

delivery_ref_rule.rule: delivery_ref = canonical WP ID from roadmap.yaml (merged/new_wp), commit/file (done), N/A_CANCEL (cancelled). NOT a LOD artifact path. NOT an LOD500 path.
delivery_ref_rule.backlog: For new_wp ideas not yet assigned to a specific WP: delivery_ref = 'backlog'
delivery_ref_rule.pipeline_closure: An idea is closed the moment its fate is decided and actioned (WP created, WP assigned, executed, or cancelled). Whether the WP shipped is roadmap.yaml's concern, not the pipeline's.

ideas.title: M7 — Staging TLS cert renewal (uPress wildcard limitation)
ideas.source: F-R2-01 (team_50 R2 verdict) + team_190 R2 BLOCKER carry-forward
ideas.description: uPress staging TLS cert is expired. Wildcard plan limitation discovered during R1 remediation. Workaround during Wave2 dev: --ignore-certificate-errors for Chrome tooling, HTTPS URL direct. MUST be resolved before M7 production cutover (cannot serve real users with HTTP-only or expired-cert redirect chain).
options: uPress panel SSL renewal (Eyal upgrades plan or buys add-on)
Let's Encrypt manual cert + cron renewal
Cloudflare Flexible SSL (if domain routed via Cloudflare)
ideas.notes: Documented in roadmap.yaml WP-W2-01-STAGE-B-IMPL gate_history (now closed/archived). Re-open trigger: M7 milestone activation OR earlier cutover sequencing requirement.

ideas.title:
Mobile

text-align override cleanup (one non-systemic rule)
ideas.description:
On mobile viewport (390x844), a sampled

resolved to text-align: left from a single override rule, while direction is rtl and other paragraphs are right-aligned. Single non-systemic override; visual RTL works (team_190 v4 PASS confirms).
ideas.owner: team_10 — natural fix during W2-02 content build when these paragraph styles will be exercised on real content pages
ideas.notes: Check site/wp-content/themes/ea-eyalamit/assets/css/ea-atoms.css mobile breakpoint for any 'p { text-align: left }' override.
